title: Sony erases digital content from libraries; reminded we don't own what we buy
abstract: Sony has taken a bold step, allowing users to completely erase digital content from their libraries with just one click—reminding us that what we "buy" may not truly be ours. Imagine your personal movie collection and music playlists vanishing into thin air! This playful yet profound moment highlights the ongoing debate over digital ownership. #Sony #DigitalRights
abstract_zh: Sony这回可真是玩儿大了：一键就能从你的音乐库和视频库中抹掉所有内容，仿佛在提醒你“不是你买的，就是别人的东西”！这下，你的私人小影院和歌单全都没了踪影，只能对着空荡荡的屏幕干瞪眼。哈哈，谁还没被科技公司套路过呢？#Sony #数字权益
